ValidationRule.description: Special Price Comments Is Mandatory if special price is needed
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( CONTAINS(fxRecordTypeName__c, 'Dealer') /*, CONTAINS($User.License_type__c, 'Partner')*/ , CONTAINS($Profile.Name,'Dealer') , TEXT(Special_Price_Question__c)= 'Yes' , ISBLANK(Special_Price_Comments__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_053: Please enter special price comments
